title: BYOK Key Access Monitor
description: Detects when a Bring-Your-Own-Key (BYOK) encryption key becomes inaccessible. Every 5 minutes it polls the Dynatrace Account Management Notifications API (BYOK_REVOKED / BYOK_ACTIVATED) via one Run JavaScript task and CREATES A DYNATRACE CUSTOM EVENT (CUSTOM_ALERT 'BYOK key access lost' / CUSTOM_INFO 'BYOK key access restored'). From there you decide what to do with the event — alert on it, trigger another workflow, or build a dashboard. No native BYOK trigger is assumed. See README.md.

fetch_byok_notifications.name: fetch_byok_notifications
fetch_byok_notifications.description: OAuth (vault) -> Account Management Notifications API (last 10m) -> parse, dedupe, persistence-gate -> create a Dynatrace custom event per record via /api/v2/events/ingest (vault Api-Token). Returns a summary.
